summary: Completed backend + frontend regression testing for iteration_6 formula fix follow-up and QS enhancements. Valid formula evaluation now works, unsafe expression blocking remains active, auto totals recalculate, manual-vs-AI detailed comparison renders/computes, weather fallback remains functional, and drawing analyzer plus major navigation routes show no regression.
action_items: Optional maintainability: split /app/frontend/src/pages/QSEstimatorPage.jsx into smaller focused components (current size >700 lines).
Optional maintainability: split /app/backend/server.py into modular routers/services (current size >700 lines).
critical_code_review_comments: Regression from iteration_7 is resolved: valid formula evaluation path is working in unit and UI checks.
Unsafe formula input remains blocked as expected.
No API/runtime failures found in scoped backend/frontend flows.
No MOCKED APIs used in this run.
seed_data_creation: UI/API created TEST_ITER8 project inputs and temporary QS measurement changes during regression run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL used from frontend/.env: https://buildcalc-estimate.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend pytest passed 19/19 (qs workflow + weather fallback + drawing analyzer enhancements). Frontend Playwright passed formula regression, unsafe blocking, totals recalculation, comparison tab, weather fallback, drawing analyzer route, and major nav routes.
rca of the issue: Previously reported regression (valid formulas returning 0) could not be reproduced now. Verification: unit test `qsFormulaEngine.test.js` passed all 3/3 and UI live checks showed valid formulas produce non-zero qty/amount while unsafe expression returns 0.
